Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs."in.comstock_building_type" NOT IN ('Warehouse', 'SmallOffice')) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/e4f82f00efe0eb10936390f2d63dd54d5b9ca23d946df6812031e56d7111ae93/9fd55ee7-a80f-4a6c-bcf2-f76919d3256d/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
